enrichment.summary: Kyle records a morning vlog from Boulder on January 16, 2017, describing his irregular sleep schedule, being snowed in, and spending the day working on his website. He reflects on the scale of his website project and a frustrating day of indecision about layout choices.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: progress is expected to be messy; just keep going
excited about how fast it is
prefers being near big windows to feel connected to outside

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He got to sleep at around noon and woke up at around five yesterday.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He was up all night and is currently still awake at 9:46 AM.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He was trying to get as far ahead on his website as possible by Monday.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He planned on selling his car but didn't due to the snow.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: His mom advised him not to go outside because it was too dangerous due to the snow.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He is super jazzed by how fast his new computer is.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He is working on surface level stuff for his website and it's going by fast.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He had moments where he felt overwhelmed by the size of his projects.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He was fixing lists and adding ads but realized he added the wrong ad.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Yesterday was a stuck-in-the-mud day where he didn't make much progress.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He had to redo his 100 levels on his 40-kilometer page because he couldn't decide how he wanted them to look.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He enjoys the cold weather and his new setup by the window.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He was listening to the History Chicks and thinks they're good.
